summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P1 features: 1) Dashboard Demographics Breakdown Chart (R27.1) - WORKING, 2) Advanced Client Filtering by status/date (R9.3) - WORKING with minor UI issue, 3) Visit Conflict Detection (R6.3) - WORKING, 4) Duplicate Client Detection (R4.5) - WORKING. All 27 backend tests passed. Frontend features verified via Playwright.

ui_bugs.issue: Select dropdown doesn't visually show selected value (Active/Pending) after selection - shows 'All Status' placeholder instead. Filter works correctly via API but UI display is inconsistent.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/dashboard/demographics returns 200
Backend: Demographics returns array with categories
Backend: Demographics has age_group category
Backend: Demographics has gender category
Backend: Demographics items have label and count fields
Backend: GET /api/clients returns 200
Backend: GET /api/clients?status=active returns only active clients (16 clients)
Backend: GET /api/clients?status=pending returns only pending clients (8 clients)
Backend: Search param searches name, email, and phone fields
Backend: Date from/to filters work correctly
Backend: POST /api/clients/check-duplicate endpoint exists
Backend: Check duplicate returns has_duplicates and duplicates fields
Backend: Check duplicate detects matching email
Backend: Check duplicate detects matching phone
Backend: No duplicate detected for new contact info
Backend: POST /api/visits/check-conflicts endpoint exists
Backend: Check conflicts returns has_conflicts and conflicts fields
Backend: Conflict detection works for overlapping visits
Backend: Case worker can access demographics endpoint
Backend: Case worker can filter clients by status
Backend: Case worker can check for duplicates
Backend: Case worker can check for visit conflicts
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Client Demographics' section with horizontal bar charts
Frontend: Demographics chart shows age_group category (56+: 8, 18-25: 7, 26-35: 6, 36-45: 2, 46-55: 1)
Frontend: Demographics chart shows gender category (Non-binary: 11, Female: 9, Male: 4)
Frontend: Clients page has status filter dropdown
Frontend: Clients page has date range filters (From/To date inputs)
Frontend: Clear filters button appears when date filter is active
Frontend: Client creation dialog shows duplicate warning when creating client with matching email
Frontend: Duplicate warning shows 'Possible duplicate detected' with matching client details
Frontend: Duplicate warning button changes to 'Create Anyway'
Frontend: Calendar 'Schedule Visit' dialog shows conflict warning when scheduling overlapping visit
Frontend: Conflict warning shows 'Scheduling Conflict Detected' with conflicting visit details
Frontend: Conflict warning button changes to 'Schedule Anyway'
action_items: MINOR: Fix status filter Select component to show selected value instead of placeholder after selection
critical_code_review_comments: Clients.js line 137: Select value={statusFilter} - when 'all' is selected, statusFilter becomes '' (empty string) which doesn't match any SelectItem value, causing the placeholder to show instead of selected value. Consider keeping value as 'all' or using a controlled display value.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all P1 features working, minor UI display issue with status filter)

seed_data_creation: Demo data already seeded - 24 clients (8 pending, 16 active), demographics with age_group and gender fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully tested and verified. All 4 features working: 1) Demographics chart visible at bottom of dashboard with age_group and gender categories, 2) Client filtering by status/date works via API (minor UI display issue with Select component), 3) Duplicate client detection shows warning with 'Create Anyway' button, 4) Visit conflict detection shows warning with 'Schedule Anyway' button. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_p1_features.py cover all endpoints.
